scenario: Large project with specific insurance and liability requirements
subject: RFQ - Aerospace Components — High Value Shipment
body:
Dear Jillian,

Precision Aerospace needs to transport high-value components and we have specific requirements:

Origin: Wichita, KS (our facility at 4500 S Oliver St)
Destination: Huntsville, AL (Redstone Arsenal — government facility, need TWIC card for drivers)

Equipment: 1 enclosed van trailer (air-ride suspension mandatory)
Commodity: Aerospace guidance system components
Declared value: $2.4 million
Weight: 8,500 lbs (lightweight but extremely high value)

Pickup: April 24, 2026 between 8am-10am
Delivery: April 25, 2026 between 1pm-3pm (appointment required)

Insurance requirements:
- Carrier must have minimum $5M cargo insurance
- Additional $3M umbrella/excess liability
- Certificate of insurance must be provided 48 hours before pickup
- White glove handling — no double-brokering allowed

Please confirm your carriers can meet these requirements before quoting.

Regards,
Amanda Wright
Logistics Manager
Precision Aerospace Corp.
(316) 555-0488

expected_extraction.special_requirements: Air-ride suspension mandatory, TWIC card required for drivers (government facility), Declared value $2.4M, Min $5M cargo insurance + $3M umbrella, COI required 48hrs before pickup, White glove handling, No double-brokering, Pickup window 8am-10am, Delivery appointment 1pm-3pm

notes: High-value shipment with extensive special requirements. Tests extraction of insurance/compliance requirements into special_requirements field. Carrier distribution (#32) will need to filter for carriers meeting insurance minimums.
